summary.lv: Datu integrāciju programmatūras inženieris Swedbank Procurement IT komandā, veidojot ServiceNow risinājumus un AI vadītas integrācijas ar Azure Data Lake un Databricks.
summary.en: Software Engineer for Data Integrations in Swedbank's Procurement IT team, building ServiceNow solutions and AI-driven integrations with Azure Data Lake and Databricks.
